title: An Act establishing safety standards for BMX bicycle and motorcross tracks

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Fernandes, a petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2681) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Dylan A. Fernandes for legislation to establish safety standards for BMX bicycle and motorcross tracks.  Public Safety and Homeland Security.
